expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers both focus areas: (1) “Template-save: Save-As overwrite / overwrite-confirmation transition” and (2) “Report-builder loading: double-click prompt element loading + single-loading-indicator outcome,” including defects BCIN-7669, BCIN-7727, and BCIN-7668.

expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md states “Primary phase under test: Phase 4a” and frames findings as “Phase 4a ... scenario-generation omissions (state transitions + observable leaves) per Phase 4a contract responsibilities,” matching the Phase 4a contract description of subcategory-first scenario drafting.
